attachments.text:
Hi,

I’m trying to build my app with Uno 2.9.3 and Android SDK 36 but it looks like Uno is trying to use an old version of Gradle plugin : 7.4.2

This Android Gradle plugin (7.4.2) was tested up to compileSdk = 33

How can I set Uno to use an newer version of the Gradle plugin ?
attachments.title: Failed to build with Android 36 [How-to Discussions]
